description: A driver calls to report a large amount of water bubbling up from a street, suspecting a water main break.

nodes.task_description: Get the exact location of the suspected break.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the address and cross-streets.

nodes.task_description: Check the network management system for any pressure alarms in that area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms low-pressure alarms on the corresponding water main.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch an emergency water crew to the location to assess the situation and begin repairs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a high-priority work order for the water department.
